builds.name: Sharpshooter GK2 Crit Spray
builds.passive: +15% Crit Chance, +50% Crit Damage — overkill crits spawn shrapnel; now applied to a fast-firing rifle instead of a sniper
builds.synopsis: Uses the Sharpshooter passive on the Deepcore GK2 with Hipster overclock to turn a high-fire-rate rifle into a crit-per-second machine. Easier to play than Thick Boy but lower peak damage.
builds.playstyle: Mid-range sustained fire — hold down GK2 and let crits roll continuously. Hipster halves the damage per bullet but fires so fast that crits land multiple times per second, and each overkill crit spawns shrapnel that chains into nearby enemies. Cryo Grenade handles clusters and buys reload time. Lower skill ceiling than M1000 Thick Boy but far more consistent damage across all encounter types.
strengths: Consistent mid-range DPS — no charge time, no single missed shot catastrophe; just aim and fire
Overkill shrapnel from rapid crits chains freely into tightly packed swarms, giving soft AoE on a single-target weapon
Online from lv6 — Hipster is the only mandatory overclock and arrives at the first level gate
weaknesses: Lower peak burst than M1000 Thick Boy — cannot one-tap elites or delete a frozen cluster in one shot
Ammo hungry; Hipster's high fire rate drains the clip quickly and reload windows leave you briefly exposed
Sharpshooter's Crit Damage bonus is slightly wasted on low-per-bullet damage — the passive rewards high base damage more than fire rate
tips: Stack Crit Chance early and hard — at 75% Crit Chance with Squint-EE5 equipped, GK2's rapid fire turns every second of fire into a shrapnel chain that kills entire packs
Cryo Grenade before firing: frozen targets cannot dodge, and shrapnel from the first crit kill bounces into every adjacent frozen enemy simultaneously
Reload before the clip is fully empty if you need to reposition — partial clip with Hipster still delivers meaningful DPS since Crit Chance applies per bullet, not per clip
Nitragenic Powder + Squint-EE5 combo works identically here as on M1000 Thick Boy; hoard Nitra to maintain Crit Chance above the 75% unlock threshold

overclocks.name: Hipster
overclocks.note: MUST-TAKE — doubles fire rate at the cost of damage per bullet; crits per second skyrocket

overclocks.name: High Caliber Rounds
overclocks.note: +damage per bullet; partially offsets Hipster's per-bullet penalty and raises crit hit value

overclocks.name: Supercooling Chamber
overclocks.note: Cryo debuff extends Cryo Grenade freeze duration — useful if you're running freeze combo loop; skip if running Boomstick as secondary

overclocks.name: Bigger Mags
overclocks.note: More shells; critical gap-filler during GK2 reloads

overclocks.name: High Velocity Bullets
overclocks.note: +damage on a cleanup weapon for anything that survived the crit chain

overclocks.name: Thick Boy
overclocks.note: Panic button for elites at melee range during reload window

overclocks.name: Compact Explosives
overclocks.note: +radius; wider freeze coverage to set up shrapnel chain kills

overclocks.name: Frost Nova
overclocks.note: Larger burst; stops incoming swarms cold so you can safely reload and re-engage

overclocks.name: Gravitational Core
overclocks.note: Clusters enemies before freeze — excellent for maximizing shrapnel chain kills; take if build is otherwise complete

overclocks.name: Overcharged PCF
overclocks.note: +damage, no downside; reliable supplemental damage between GK2 reloads

overclocks.name: Plasma Burst
overclocks.note: AoE plasma clears stragglers shrapnel missed

overclocks.name: Volatile Impact Mixture
overclocks.note: Fire DoT doesn't benefit from Sharpshooter passive; skip in favor of another damage card

never: Popup Tripod — GK2 Hipster requires you to keep moving and repositioning between clips

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: Priority: GK2 > Boomstick > Drak-25. Lock GK2 immediately. Unlike M1000, this build is playable from the first wave — Sharpshooter crit passive applies from lv1 even before Hipster arrives.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: GK2 lv6: Hipster without hesitation. This is the entire build identity. Fire rate doubles, crits per second skyrocket, and overkill shrapnel starts chaining immediately.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Buy Squint-EE5 the moment it appears — Sharpshooter's 15% base Crit Chance plus any Crit stat cards gets you to the 75% unlock threshold faster than most classes. Save 100g target.

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: Push GK2 to lv12 (High Caliber Rounds). Deploy Cryo Grenade — freeze incoming waves, fire GK2 into the frozen cluster, and let shrapnel chain kills handle the rest. Add Boomstick for melee pressure relief.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: GK2 lv12: High Caliber Rounds for the per-bullet damage boost. Boomstick lv6: Bigger Mags. Cryo Grenade lv6: Compact Explosives for wider freeze setup.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Buy Nitragenic Powder if it appears — hold Nitra, maintain 75%+ Crit Chance, and Squint-EE5's -30% damage penalty stays suppressed. Spend ~30g on Crit Chance stat upgrades. Target 120g saved for Stage 3.

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: GK2 reaches lv18 this stage. Supercooling Chamber or cap out at High Caliber if a better secondary investment exists. Cryo Grenade + GK2 Hipster crits should be chaining kills through entire swarms by now.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: GK2 lv18: Supercooling Chamber if running freeze combo, otherwise hold for flex. Boomstick lv12: High Velocity Bullets. Add Crit Damage global stat cards over raw Damage — multiplies on every crit.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Full spend. Complete Squint-EE5 + Nitragenic Powder combo. Pickled Nitra stacks damage on top of Crit — holding a large Nitra reserve gives both Crit Chance and bonus Damage simultaneously.

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: Boomstick to lv18 (Thick Boy panic button). Drak-25 for AoE plasma between GK2 reloads. Cryo Grenade to lv18 if Gravitational Core is available — cluster pull before freeze maximizes shrapnel chains.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: Cryo lv12–18: Frost Nova then Gravitational Core. Drak-25 lv6–12: Overcharged PCF then Plasma Burst. All Crit Damage and Reload Speed global upgrades are priority buys.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Save 30g for Stage 5. Energy Bars is worth picking up now — per-level damage bonus compounds even if HP cost is a concern; pair with BLT Ration Pack for buffer.

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: Against Dreadnought: Cryo Grenade freezes the boss, then GK2 Hipster fires crits continuously. Each crit contributes to shrapnel on escort kills, clearing adds while you stay focused on the boss.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: Take every Crit Chance, Crit Damage, and Reload Speed upgrade. Piercing on GK2 is excellent — each bullet can hit multiple enemies in a line, generating more crit opportunities per shot.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Spend everything. Mine aggressively to stack Nitragenic Powder Crit Chance. Dump gold on rerolls for Pay2Win Console stacks if not already held. Keep Nitra reserve high for maximum Crit Chance floor.

builds.name: Survivalist Boltshark Pinner
builds.passive: +20% Move Speed, +3 HP Regen/s above 50% HP — use speed to kite after pinning enemies in place
builds.synopsis: Boltshark with Bolt Volley pins three enemies simultaneously, then Survivalist speed lets you kite away while they're immobilized. GK2 cleans up staggered packs at a safe distance.
builds.playstyle: Fire a Cryo Bolt to freeze a target, then immediately fire Bolt Volley to pin three enemies at once. Survivalist's movement speed lets you dash clear before anything closes the gap, and HP regen above 50% keeps you topped up between engagements. The loop is low-risk: pin, dash, clean up with GK2, regen, repeat. Unlike Infiltrator Cryo Burst, you don't need precision timing — just pin and retreat.
strengths: Boltshark with Bolt Volley pins three targets simultaneously — effective crowd control that Survivalist's speed turns into safe kill windows
+20% Move Speed makes retreating after a Bolt Volley trivial, and the regen kicks in immediately once distance is established
No mandatory lv18 breakpoint — the build delivers solid CC and damage from lv12 Bolt Volley onward
weaknesses: Lower single-target burst than Boltshark on Infiltrator — no +50% burst window means each bolt deals baseline damage only
Bolt Volley's three simultaneous bolts can miss on widely spread or fast-moving enemies if you don't set up with Cryo Bolt first
Ammunition management: Boltshark has a small clip and Bolt Volley consumes three bolts at once — reload timing matters more than on GK2 or Zhukov builds
tips: Always lead with Cryo Bolt to freeze the primary target before firing Bolt Volley — frozen enemies cannot dodge, and the three bolts from Bolt Volley all land reliably on a stationary target
Survivalist's +20% Move Speed makes collecting XP orbs from distant kills much easier — actively chase orbs between waves instead of waiting for enemies to come to you
GK2 Hipster as secondary turns the build into a hybrid: Bolt Volley handles elite pinning while GK2 handles rapid trash clear, playing to both the Survivalist passive and Boltshark's precision
BLT Ration Pack raises your 50% HP regen threshold — with more Max HP, the regen activates more reliably after minor chip damage during a Bolt Volley setup

overclocks.name: Cryo Bolt
overclocks.note: Freeze target before Bolt Volley — ensures all three bolts land on an immobile enemy

overclocks.name: Gas Rerouting
overclocks.note: +reload; faster turnaround between Bolt Volley volleys; critical for the pin-retreat-reload loop

overclocks.name: Bolt Volley
overclocks.note: MUST-TAKE — fires 3 bolts simultaneously; the CC + damage spike that defines this build

overclocks.name: Hipster
overclocks.note: High fire rate secondary for trash clear between Boltshark volleys; Survivalist speed keeps you out of retaliation range

overclocks.name: High Caliber Rounds
overclocks.note: +damage per bullet; useful against anything Bolt Volley didn't finish

overclocks.name: Supercooling Chamber
overclocks.note: Cryo debuff on GK2 extends Cryo Bolt freeze durations — take if you want longer pin windows

overclocks.name: Compact Explosives
overclocks.note: +radius; wider freeze while you're repositioning post-Bolt Volley

overclocks.name: Frost Nova
overclocks.note: Larger burst; emergency CC when a wave catches up despite Survivalist speed

overclocks.name: Gravitational Core
overclocks.note: Pull cluster before freeze — Bolt Volley into a tight frozen group hits more enemies; strong in dense waves

overclocks.name: Bigger Mags
overclocks.note: More shells for melee panic situations when enemies close faster than expected

overclocks.name: High Velocity Bullets
overclocks.note: +damage on point-blank cleanup after a Bolt Volley that didn't one-tap

overclocks.name: Thick Boy
overclocks.note: Emergency burst for elite that survived full Bolt Volley — fires while moving

avoid: Potency — no DoT in this build
Popup Tripod — movement is the entire survival strategy

never: Popup Tripod — Survivalist must stay mobile; standing still to stack fire rate kills the regen passive and invites melee

phases.title: Find Boltshark, Learn the Pin Loop

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: Priority: Boltshark > GK2 > Cryo Grenade. Boltshark with Cryo Bolt is the carry — freeze one target with Cryo Bolt, then fire a regular bolt for practice before Bolt Volley arrives at lv18. GK2 handles trash in the meantime.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: Boltshark lv6: Cryo Bolt immediately. Even without Bolt Volley, a freeze shot followed by a high-damage bolt is a solid early-game pattern. GK2 lv6: Hipster for rapid trash clear.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Buy BLT Ration Pack early — raising Max HP makes the 50% regen threshold more forgiving and extends the window where Survivalist passive is active. Save 100g. Prioritize Damage stat cards.

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: Push Boltshark to lv12 (Gas Rerouting). Faster reload between volleys is critical for the pin-dash-regen-reload loop. Deploy Cryo Grenade as area CC backup when multiple swarms converge.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: Boltshark lv12: Gas Rerouting. GK2 lv12: High Caliber Rounds for better trash clear. Cryo Grenade lv6: Compact Explosives for wider emergency freeze.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Energy Bars is excellent here — Survivalist doesn't stack HP, so the per-level damage bonus is a clean gain. Spend ~30g on Damage upgrades. Save 120g for Stage 3 power spike.

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: POWER SPIKE. Boltshark lv18: Bolt Volley fires 3 bolts simultaneously. The loop is now: Cryo Bolt to freeze → Bolt Volley triple-hit into frozen target → GK2 Hipster cleans up surrounding trash → dash to regen → repeat.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: Bolt Volley is the build. Cryo Grenade lv12: Frost Nova for larger emergency freeze. GK2 lv18: Supercooling Chamber if available — extends Cryo Bolt freeze window so Bolt Volley always hits frozen targets.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Full spend. Gold-Tipped Bullets scales with accumulated gold — Survivalist speed means you mine faster per stage and accumulate gold quickly. Look for Squint-EE5 — Boltshark bolts crit, and the bonus applies per bolt in the Volt Volley.

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: Boomstick to lv18 (Thick Boy panic button). Cryo Grenade toward lv18: Gravitational Core clusters enemies before the Bolt Volley for maximum multi-hit. All kits mostly complete by end of Stage 4.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: Cryo lv18: Gravitational Core is the final combo piece. Boomstick lv18: Thick Boy for mobile burst panic. Any global Crit Damage or Reload Speed upgrades are priority insta-buys.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Save 30g for Stage 5. Complete BLT Ration Pack + Energy Bars core. Armor Grease is worth buying for the stacking Dodge Chance while moving — Survivalist always moves, so it reaches max stacks naturally.

decisions.label: Weapon Pick
decisions.content: Against Dreadnought: Gravitational Core Cryo Grenade clusters escorts, then Cryo Bolt freezes Dreadnought, then Bolt Volley triple-hit during the freeze window. GK2 Hipster handles escort trash while Boltshark reloads.

decisions.label: Overclock Choice
decisions.content: Take all Damage, Reload Speed, and Movement Speed upgrades. Movement Speed for Survivalist directly increases how often regen activates — faster you establish distance after a Bolt Volley, the more HP you regen before re-engaging.

decisions.label: Shop Strategy
decisions.content: Spend everything. Gold-Tipped Bullets: hold gold through the run for maximum boss damage. Mine aggressively using Survivalist speed advantage. Dump nitra on rerolls for Squint-EE5 if still missing.
